name: Arbor Realty Trust 6.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock Liquidation Preference $25.00 per Share
summary: Arbor Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a diversified portfolio of structured finance assets in the multifamily and commercial real estate markets, including bridge and mezzanine loans, and preferred equity. The 6.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a specific series of preferred shares issued by Arbor Realty Trust with a liquidation preference of $25.00 per share. Arbor Realty Trust is headquartered in Uniondale, New York.
